title: CAS Observation Record (one per line in observations.jsonl)
description: One JSON object per line. Recorded in Phase 6 (Evaluation); links to prediction via action_id.

success.description: Whether the outcome matched expectations (no prediction error)

match.description: Explicit match vs mismatch for learning

raw_ref.description: Reference to stored output: path to file e.g. memory/raw/{session_id}/{action_id}.txt, or hash if hash-only policy

observation_summary.description: Short summary of what was observed (for queries without reading raw)

stderr_ref.description: Optional path or ref to stderr if stored separately

entry_id.description: Optional stable id (e.g. UUID) for this line; report can use entry_id_refs for audit under log compaction

run_nonce.description: Optional. From STATE.run_nonce or run_nonce.txt; required for live-evidence runs.
